description_long: This is a modern, full-size pickup truck with a double cab and a prominent cargo bed at the rear. The body features a two-tone color scheme, primarily red with white accents along the sides and doors. The front end is equipped with a large grille, robust bumper, and wide side mirrors, while the rear displays a spacious open cargo bed and a visible tow hitch. The wheels are large, rugged, and fitted with off-road tires, suggesting capability for both urban and rougher environments. The truck has four passenger doors, tinted windows, and side steps for easier entry. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for transporting goods or passengers in urban and suburban settings.
description: A red and white double-cab pickup truck with a large cargo bed, off-road tires, and four doors. It features a robust, modern design with side steps and a visible tow hitch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, large windshield, side mirrors, and the robust bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the double cab, four doors, side step, and the open cargo bed.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open cargo bed, tailgate, rear lights, and tow hitch.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the double cab, four doors, side step, and cargo bed.
